title: SponsorBlock
summary:
Skip YouTube video sponsors (browser extension) 
 Logo by munadikieh SponsorBlock Download ChromeChromium Firefox Android Edge Safari for MacOS and iOS Website Stats 3rd-Party Ports MPV Kodi Chromecast iOS SponsorBlock is an open-source crowdsourced browser extension to skip sponsor segments in YouTube videos. Users submit when a sponsor happens from the extension, and the extension automatically skips sponsors it knows about. It also supports skipping other categories, such as intros, outros an
